description: Download the Herceptin Fab structure (PDB: 1N8Z). Isolate one Fab copy (chains A and B) by deleting chains C and D and removing all solvent/water molecules. Define the Light Chain (Chain A) CDRs using Kabat residue ranges (L-CDR1: 24-34, L-CDR2: 50-56, L-CDR3: 89-97). Define the Heavy Chain (Chain B) CDRs using Kabat residue ranges (H-CDR1: 31-35, H-CDR2: 50-65, H-CDR3: 95-102). Calculate the Solvent Accessible Surface Area (SASA) in Å² for the entire isolated Fab (Chains A + B), the combined Light Chain CDRs, and the combined Heavy Chain CDRs. Ensure accurate SASA calculation by setting 'dot_solvent' to 1. Create a high-quality visualization of the Fab in surface representation, coloring the Framework (all non-CDR residues) White/Grey, Light Chain CDRs Blue, and Heavy Chain CDRs Red. Ray trace and save the image to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/herceptin_cdrs.png. Write a report to ~/PyMOL_Data/cdr_sasa_report.txt explicitly listing the three calculated SASA values.
